steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The dash introduces: "the museum staff consulted numerous sources to ensure the accuracy of the displays." This shows the research was thorough and carefully done.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Define: the blank names a positive quality of the research, evidenced by consulting numerous sources to ensure accuracy — strict, careful thoroughness. Substitute each choice: A) rigor of the research — rigor means exactness and careful attention to detail; fits the evidence of thorough sourcing. B) obscurity of the research — obscurity means being unknown or unclear, which contradicts the praise in the sentence; eliminated. C) shallowness of the research — shallowness is the opposite of thorough; directly contradicted by "numerous sources"; eliminated. D) novelty of the research — novelty means newness or originality, not carefulness; nothing in the text signals this quality; eliminated. Verdict: A is correct.
